content_body:
Fallen Timber, how wonderful you are! Thank you so much for the wonderful stay. 

The last few days have been such a relaxing experience. We appreciate the great cabin that we got when we arrived.

Memories have been made, relationships have been made stronger and better, and we all leave with rested minds and spirits. 

Thank you, Thank you, Thank you...

We look forward to coming back!
title: Wonderful and Relaxing Getaway at Fallen Timber Lodge
